title: struthiopteris dura
intro: Struthiopteris dura, also known as the rough horsetail fern or Struthiopteris, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Struthiopteridaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Struthiopteris dura include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Struthiopteris dura is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its availability and use may vary due to its classification as an endangered species.
